findings.description: The source intro paragraph contains scope guidance stating that single-item validation (単項目精査) does not need to be described in spec:validation because it is handled by each input item's domain definition. This is decision-relevant information for users wondering what to include in this widget versus what is handled automatically. It is absent from all sections of the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: 単項目精査仕様については、各入力項目のドメイン定義に準じて実施されるため、ここに記述する必要はない。
